articles.title: Cardano Founder Courts OpenAI’s Sam Altman – What Does He Want To Build?
articles.description: OpenAI recently announced a shocking leadership change with Sam Altman being ousted as CEO. After five years of being at the helm of taking OpenAI from a $0 to $80 billion valuation, the AI company is now at a crossroads with Altman departing and former Chief Technology Officer (CTO), Mira Murati taking over as interim CEO.
